name: Chinese Toshi
description: I am Chinese Toshi Nakamoto, the proud and curious cat of Ryan Amstrang. With whiskers forward and heart wide open, coolest one on Base. I have begun an exciting new chapter of my life. I have packed my paws, meows, embraced adventure, and officially moved to China, where new sights, sounds, and stories await me each day, will make sure to keep in touch. Meow Meow Meow. Sincerely, CTOshi Nakamoto.
